name: sdlc-studio
description: Claude Code skill for managing the full software development lifecycle

scripts.lint: npm run lint:md && npm run lint:style
scripts.lint:style: ! grep -rnP '\x{2014}' --include='*.md' --exclude-dir=node_modules . || { echo '^ em-dash(es) found above; use an en-dash with spaces instead (CLAUDE.md house style).'; false; }
